text: Stepping into this modern, brightly-lit corridor, I’m confronted by reflections and glass barriers, hinting at knowledge just out of reach. The second image brings me into a space dedicated to inquiry and creation—R+D, a site for curiosity and discovery. Here, information pulses from screens and walls, and I’m filled with a sense of anticipation at the possibilities. I feel inquisitive and eager, as if on the verge of learning something new and transformative.
